title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
